messages.content:
[Verse]
My heart overflows, my love for you grows
Like a delicate rose, eternal it glows

_, _
In all highs and lows, Forever I'm Yours

Fill in the blank with what could rhyme
With every sun that rose, in every shadow it throws

[Verse]
My heart overflows, my love for you grows
Like a delicate rose, eternal it glows

_, _
In all highs and lows, Forever I’m Yours

Fill in the blank with what could rhyme, make sure it's 5 syllables per half-line so 10 total
Through time's endless prose, our bond only shows
Amidst the fiercest foes, our love still bestows
Through winter's cold snows, our warm passion flows
Something like Obeying your laws, Fulfilling your cause, but with perfect rhymes with In all highs and lows, Forever I'm Yours
Obeying your laws, fulfilling your cause

[Verse]
My heart overflows, my love for you grows
Like a delicate rose, eternal it glows

_, _
In all highs and lows, Forever I’m Yours

Fill in the blank with what could rhyme, originally it was "Obeying your laws, Fulfilling your cause" but it's not a perfect rhyme
Matching your pace, embracing your flaws

[Verse]
My heart overflows, my love for you grows
Like a delicate rose, eternal it glows

_, _ <- (something better than Obeying your laws, Fulfilling your cause)
In all highs and lows, Forever I’m Yours

Fill in the blank with what could rhyme, originally it was “” but it’s not a perfect rhyme
Guiding our ways, in your love, I'm engrossed
make sure it perfectly rhymes with In all highs and lows, Forever I’m Yours
In each night that closes, in each dawn that rose

[Verse]
My heart overflows, my love for you grows
Like a delicate rose, eternal it glows

With each dawn that rose, _
In all highs and lows, Forever I'm Yours

Fill in the blank instead of _
